mapper.select:
SELECT p.id as postId, p.title, SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 200) as summary, p.view_count as viewCount, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.is_top as isTop, p.create_time as createTime, c.name as categoryName, u.id as 'author.userId', u.nickname as 'author.nickname', u.avatar as 'author.avatar' FROM post p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC
